utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You know , I do not think we brought enough stuff . Did you forget to pack the baby anvil ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: It is gonna be worth it .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: It is a known fact that women love babies , all right ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Women love guys who love babies .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: It is that whole sensitive thing .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Quick , aim him at that pack o babes over there .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Maybe one of them will break away .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: No , no wait , forget them , we got one , hard left .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: All right , gimme the baby .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No , I got him .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Come on , seriously .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh , seriously you want him ?

utterances.speaker: Woman
utterances.text: Hello .

utterances.speaker: Chandler and Joey
utterances.text: Hello .

utterances.speaker: Woman
utterances.text: Who is this little cutie ... pie ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , do not , do not think me immodest , but , me ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You wanna smell him ?

utterances.speaker: Woman
utterances.text: I assume we are talking about the baby now .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh , yeah . He is got that great baby smell . Get a whiff of his head .

emotion_cause.span: 19_He is got that great baby smell .

utterances.speaker: Woman
utterances.text: I think my uterus just skipped a beat .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: What would I tell you ? What would I tell you ?

utterances.speaker: Woman
utterances.text: I think it is great you guys are doing this .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , we are great guys .
